mapper.select: SELECT genre,COUNT(*) AS total FROM film GROUP BY genre ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT year, country, COUNT(*) AS count FROM everyyear_country_film GROUP BY year, country ORDER BY `year`
SELECT genre, COUNT(genre) AS total_count FROM every_year_different_genre GROUP BY genre ORDER BY total_count DESC;
SELECT actor,COUNT(actor) AS actor_total_films FROM everyyear_actor_number_films GROUP BY actor ORDER BY actor_total_films DESC LIMIT 0,40
SELECT * FROM everyyear_actor_number_films WHERE `year` = 2020 ORDER BY actor_total_films desc LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM everyyear_actor_number_films WHERE `year` = 2021 ORDER BY actor_total_films desc LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM everyyear_actor_number_films WHERE `year` = 2022 ORDER BY actor_total_films desc LIMIT 20
select duration_group,average_rating from result_table_year_duration_total_films_avg_vote where year = 2009 order by average_rating desc
select * from every_year_different_genre where year between 2010 and 2022
SELECT country,AVG(avg_vote) AS AVG FROM result_table_year_country_genre_avg_vote GROUP BY country ORDER BY AVG(avg_vote) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT director,AVG(avg_vote) as avg FROM result_table_year_director_avg_vote GROUP BY director ORDER BY avg desc LIMIT 10
SELECT director,AVG(avg_vote) as avg FROM result_table_year_director_avg_vote GROUP BY director ORDER BY avg LIMIT 10
SELECT year , AVG(avg_vote) as AVG FROM result_table_year_country_genre_avg_vote GROUP BY `year` ORDER BY `year`
SELECT director,COUNT(*) as total_films,AVG(avg_vote) as AVG FROM result_table_year_director_avg_vote GROUP BY director ORDER BY total_films DESC LIMIT 20
